briefdescription.para: Wrapper macro for declaring device API structs inside iterable sections.
Expands to the pointer of a device's API for a given class.

simplesect.para: the pointer to the device API.

briefdescription.para: Macro that evaluates to a boolean that can be used to check if a device is of a particular class.

parameterdescription.para: If the device is of the given class
If the device is not of the given class
